reviews.review_description:
Im not gonna lie, this game is creative - Adding a variety of new things that you dont really see in other games, such as different tree types in forest, and how instead of making the early access badge, they made a launch day bundle for the people who are og and have been playing since the start of the game. I also like the cosmetics like the banana hat, but there are some times a few minor or big mistakes and bugs that the game can have. But the developers/owners put dedication and detail into there game so bugs or glitches are taken upon action and will eventually get fixed!

Over all, I've met some really cool people and also, love everyone's content too! They also have a discord server that you can join if you want notification for when a new update or bug fixes come out! -Also, they host frequent ingame fan codes to meet with some of the staff, content creators, and even the owners!)

I say you should get this game!

This game from first expression does look like it can have potential infection lobbies don’t work. I’m not able to tag anybody even. I’m clearly tagging them. Needs a voice system because there is a lot of toxic people  overall this game can have potential just need to fix those bugs ￼￼￼

honestly, this fangame is incredibly high quality,  but with high quality, there are bugs that make me hold back my 5 stars, firstly, LIV doesnt work, second this game is way too similar to gorilah, or monkey bunch, which kinda upsets me because this fangame is good, clearing those away its a good fangame.

Honestly after playing this game yesterday i gotta say its a really well made game! Which almost feels like a really great retake on gtag! I really LOVE the physics cuz it makes it easier to wall run and stuff! And feels faster! Which i really like 

I wish this game well so buh bai!!

reviews.review_title: Really good gorilla tag fam game
reviews.review_description:
It is a really nice game for a fan game, I have not seen better fan games than this. Here is a few things why I think this doesn’t deserve 1 star more:

No turning, my neck hurts because of turning fast
No wardrobe to put on cosmetics 
The hands are offset my controller, like I have small stick long arms, why this? I can’t properly hit branches
Wonky physics, sometimes get stuck in the floor, and I fall off branches when my hands are on the branches

need a better moderation system but overall its a good game

Fix your moderaters
10/10 would play again

I have NEVER and I mean NEVER seen a completely FREE TO PLAY game on meta, and I have to say, it’s so much nicer. There is in game currency, but you get 100 a day. So that makes it fine to have. The gameplay is great too! I love all the new modes and mechanics, and can’t wait for the “BOMB” mode! The only downside is that on the Quest 2, it sometimes won’t load lobbies in infection, casual, and the water rising one. Other than that, I give it a solid 4.5/5.

This game takes a genre and makes it creative! I really like the easy way of traveling compared to Gorilla tags slow paced movement! Also the mapes are great, and obviously the game just released so you can’t really judge it, there is always space for improvement, but I think the developers will do that, improve the game! Just when I first tried to play the game it felt mesmerizing, because even if you’re not a very good player, the games easy mechanics makes you feel good while playing it! In summary I really think you should download the game and I promise that you will have a great time playing it!

This game is super fun because it is like gorilla tag but it doesnt get boring. I think the walls are super duper easy so is everything else so it is easy to get the hang of. I might start making content on this game because of how fun it is. The only down side is it has a little bit of bugs but other that that this is really fun
